title: Awesome Web Effects expansion from 100 to 150

effects.name: Iris-aperture navigation
effects.difference: A ten-blade mechanical aperture changes the actual visible route; it is not a circular cursor, scale hover, or generic clip-path reveal.

behavior.response: Rotate interlocking blades and continuously resize the navigable opening

effects.prompt: Create a dark editorial navigation stage where ten interlocking brass blades form a real mechanical iris. Pointer movement and arrow keys must continuously change the opening while preserving a readable focal route.

implementation.snippet: for(let i=0;i<10;i++){const a=i/10*TAU+open*.32;drawBlade(p,a,12+open*38,72)}

effects.rationaleZh: 十片叶片共同定义真实孔径，主体行为、机械感和导航隐喻都能在缩略图中直接辨认。

effects.name: Elastic baseline letter wave
effects.difference: Every glyph inherits position and rotation from one deforming baseline; it is not split-text staggering, marquee motion, or a whole-word transform.

behavior.response: Pull a continuous baseline and propagate tension into individual glyph poses
behavior.timing: continuous local deformation with traveling wave

effects.prompt: Build the word SPRING on a continuous elastic baseline. A pointer-local Gaussian pull must bend the line while every glyph derives its vertical position and rotation from the neighboring curve points.

implementation.snippet: const y=98+sin(phase+i*.82)*15+(pointer.y-.5)*exp(-pow(x/width-pointer.x,2)*25)*90;

effects.rationaleZh: 字母不是独立漂浮，而是共享一条受力基线，张力来源和排版反馈关系清楚。

effects.name: Orbital card constellation
effects.difference: Cards maintain a rotating orbital graph around a movable gravity center instead of reflowing a grid, stacking, or traveling in a straight carousel.

behavior.response: Orbit five connected cards and tighten their shared radius on activation
behavior.timing: continuous orbital layout with discrete gravity mode

effects.prompt: Create five colored editorial cards that orbit a shared center and remain connected by constellation lines. Pointer input offsets the gravity center; activation must tighten the radius without becoming a carousel.

implementation.snippet: const theta=phase+i/cards.length*TAU;card.x=cx+cos(theta)*radius;card.y=cy+sin(theta)*radius*.58;

effects.rationaleZh: 旋转轨道、跨节点连线和可变引力中心形成独立空间语法，与卡堆和网格重排有明显差异。

effects.name: Magnetic pixel-sort field
effects.difference: A proximity threshold reorganizes seeded cells into chromatic order; it is not a displacement ripple, binary pixel wake, or post-process mosaic.

behavior.response: Locally sort colored cell rows and stretch them toward a magnetic axis

effects.prompt: Render a deterministic field of colored pixel cells. Near the pointer axis, cells must sort into ordered rows and stretch; far cells must retain seeded disorder so the sorting boundary is visible.

implementation.snippet: const sortedRow=round(noise*(rows-1)*(1-pull)+row*pull);p.rect(x,sortedRow*cellH,cellW-1,height);

effects.rationaleZh: 有序与无序区域由指针距离直接划分，磁轴、色带和单元迁移使排序机制一眼可见。

effects.name: Kinetic paper-fold map
effects.difference: A triangulated sheet changes its face topology and apex position like origami; it is not card rotation, accordion slicing, or a flat polygon morph.

behavior.response: Fold four connected paper faces around a moving crease apex
behavior.timing: continuous fold geometry with latched closed state

effects.prompt: Design a four-face paper map whose shared vertices remain connected while one apex folds inward. Use contrasting paper faces, a real crease, and a moving shadow to communicate depth.

implementation.snippet: const apex={x:lerp(cx+half,cx+10,fold),y:lerp(cy-half,cy-4,fold)};faces.forEach(drawConnectedFace);

effects.rationaleZh: 共享顶点和多面明暗让折纸深度真实可读，点击锁定又提供明确的交互结果。

effects.name: Radar-sweep annotation reveal
effects.difference: Annotations become legible only when an angular beam passes their bearing; it is not a radial loading ring or opacity stagger.

behavior.response: Sweep a conic beam and reveal evidence labels by angular proximity
behavior.timing: continuous angular scan with local persistence

effects.prompt: Build a radar field with concentric range rings and three fixed evidence targets. A moving conic beam must control each target label’s brightness from angular distance, making the reveal causal.

implementation.snippet: const delta=abs(atan2(sin(sweep-target.a),cos(sweep-target.a)));const alpha=max(.18,1-delta/.65);

effects.rationaleZh: 扫描线是批注可见性的明确因果主体，方位、距离环和证据标签共同构成完整仪器叙事。

effects.name: Moiré tunnel zoom
effects.difference: Dozens of phase-offset rings create interference depth around a steerable vanishing point; it is not a starfield, particle vortex, or ordinary scale zoom.

behavior.response: Advance alternating rings toward the viewer and bend their shared tunnel axis

effects.prompt: Create a cream-and-red moiré tunnel from at least thirty alternating elliptical rings. Phase-wrap ring scale for an infinite zoom and let pointer movement bend the vanishing point.

implementation.snippet: const progress=(i/34+time/3)%1;const d=9+progress*progress*285;p.ellipse(vx+drift,vy,d,d*(.46+progress*.22));

effects.rationaleZh: 密集线环的相位交错直接产生空间干涉和无限推进感，视觉签名强且不依赖粒子。

effects.name: Liquid chrome letterform
effects.difference: A multistop moving specular field changes one oversized glyph’s material; it is not text blur, gooey fusion, or simple gradient animation.

behavior.response: Move cyan, white, pink, and violet highlights across an outlined glyph

effects.prompt: Render one oversized S as liquid chrome using a pointer-centered multistop gradient, a crisp metallic outline, glow, and nearby contour waves. The glyph must remain readable at all times.

implementation.snippet: const g=ctx.createLinearGradient(lightX-95,0,lightX+95,0);g.addColorStop(.36,'#fff8df');ctx.fillText('S',211,101);

effects.rationaleZh: 高光位置真实绑定输入，单字的轮廓、光谱与波纹共同呈现金属流动材质。

effects.name: Accordion image slices
effects.difference: Alternating trapezoid slices flex a single visual surface in depth; it is not a card rail, page fold, or horizontal image wipe.

behavior.response: Open eleven alternating image planes with changing width and slant

effects.prompt: Split one editorial image system into eleven alternating trapezoid slices. Pointer movement must change each slice width and slant while retaining one continuous accordion silhouette.

implementation.snippet: p.quad(cursor,top+slant,cursor+width,top-slant,cursor+width,top+height+slant,cursor,top+height-slant);

effects.rationaleZh: 十一片交替平面同时改变宽度与倾角，媒体表面像手风琴开合，区别于直线轮播。

effects.name: Typographic time slit
effects.difference: A moving horizontal cut exposes a second complete sentence inside the first; it is not text replacement, typewriter playback, or a full-page scene wipe.

behavior.response: Move a bounded slit that reveals an offset alternate typographic timeline

effects.prompt: Set two oversized three-line sentences in contrasting palettes. A narrow pointer-controlled horizontal slit must clip the alternate sentence into the base sentence, with visible cut boundaries.

implementation.snippet: ctx.save();ctx.rect(0,slitY-slitH/2,width,slitH);ctx.clip();drawAlternateSentence();ctx.restore();

effects.rationaleZh: 裂隙只替换局部时间层，双句在同一排版坐标中碰撞，遮罩边界和语义都清晰可见。

effects.name: Kinetic rain letterpress
effects.difference: 字模受确定性重力下落并在纸面碰撞瞬间留下被压扁的墨迹，不是字符雨或普通打字动画。

behavior.response: Falling type blocks stamp widening ink impressions when they strike paper
behavior.timing: continuous gravity cycles with discrete impacts

effects.prompt: 使用固定字模数组实现下落、碰撞和压印；指针纵向位置控制重力强度，墨迹只在接触纸面时出现。

implementation.snippet: new p5(p => { p.draw = () => typeBlocks.forEach(block => drawFallAndImpression(p, block, gravity)); });

effects.rationaleZh: 下落字模、纸面基线与碰撞墨迹形成明确的活版因果，材质与动作均可辨。

effects.name: Recursive arc forest growth
effects.difference: 五棵树使用弯曲二次贝塞尔分枝并按递归深度逐层生长，区别于直线 L-system 或粒子枝条。

behavior.response: Curved branches recursively bifurcate from trunks to fine canopy arcs

effects.prompt: 实现固定种子的七层递归树，使用 quadraticCurveTo 绘制弯曲分枝，并让进度按深度依次解锁。

implementation.snippet: new p5(p => { p.draw = () => trees.forEach(tree => branch(p.drawingContext, tree, depth, progress)); });

effects.rationaleZh: 递归层级、弧线姿态和多树构图在小画面中仍清楚，生成逻辑可复现。

effects.name: Pointer woven ribbon loom
effects.difference: 横向经线和纵向纬线以不同相位真实交错，指针改变两组丝带弯曲幅度，而非网格扭曲滤镜。

behavior.response: Warp and weft ribbons bend through opposing phase fields while retaining weave order

effects.prompt: 绘制十二条经线与八条纬线，使用虚线相位制造上下交织关系，并让指针控制流体弯曲幅度。

implementation.snippet: new p5(p => { p.draw = () => drawWarpAndWeft(p.drawingContext, pointerBend); });

effects.rationaleZh: 经纬拓扑与纺织色彩形成鲜明主体，交织而非叠线的结构可以直接辨认。

effects.name: Boids flock pointer avoidance
effects.difference: 每个箭头同时呈现群集漂移与局部避让，指针不是装饰光标，而是会改变整群方向和空隙的动态障碍。

behavior.trigger: pointer movement, arrow keys, or automatic orbit
behavior.response: A cohesive flock opens a moving exclusion pocket around the focus

implementation.snippet: createP5Demo({ id: 'boids-flock-pointer-avoidance', draw: (p, t, state) => drawSteeredFlock(p, t, state.pointer) });

effects.rationaleZh: 42 个方向箭头共同让出移动空间，因果关系强，明显区别于普通粒子跟随或散点背景。

effects.name: Reaction diffusion growth field
effects.difference: 像素单元以相位稳定的扩散阈值形成有机边缘，交互焦点会重新定义生长核心，而不是播放预渲染纹理。

behavior.trigger: pointer movement or automatic seed orbit
behavior.response: Organic reaction bands grow, split, and reconnect around a movable seed

implementation.snippet: for (let y=0;y<180;y+=3) for (let x=0;x<320;x+=3) drawReactionCell(p,x,y,seed,time);

effects.rationaleZh: 扩散环、双波干涉和可移动种子形成清楚的有机生成机制，静态纹理无法替代。

effects.name: Poisson constellation bloom
effects.difference: 固定采样节点只连接局部近邻，经过焦点时边、节点亮度与尺寸共同绽放，区别于全连接网络或随机星空。

behavior.trigger: pointer movement, keyboard focus movement, or automatic orbit
behavior.response: Nearby seeded nodes connect and locally bloom around the focus

implementation.snippet: if (distance(a,b) < 47) drawEdge(p,a,b,focus); points.forEach(point => drawBloomNode(p,point,focus));

effects.rationaleZh: 局部近邻图与焦点绽放同时可见，具有稳定构图和明确的空间权重关系。

effects.name: Signed distance neon metaballs
effects.difference: 每个像素块求多个动态圆场的能量和，在几何相触之前出现发光连接颈，不是叠加半透明圆。

behavior.trigger: pointer movement, press, or automatic orbital motion
behavior.response: Three scalar fields merge into one thresholded emissive silhouette

implementation.snippet: const field = balls.reduce((sum,b) => sum + b.r*b.r / distanceSquared(pixel,b), 0); drawThreshold(p,field);

effects.rationaleZh: 能量阈值、发光边缘和交互融球半径都由真实逐格场计算产生，机制辨识度高。

effects.name: Kinetic typography letter springs
effects.difference: 单个字母围绕各自基准点受力、旋转和改变字号，指针离开后仍由确定性弹簧相位保持字形队列，而非整体文本平移。

behavior.trigger: pointer movement or keyboard focus movement
behavior.response: Individual letters repel, rotate, scale, and visually spring toward home positions
behavior.timing: continuous force response with phase-stable recovery

implementation.snippet: [...'ELASTIC'].forEach((letter,i) => drawSpringLetter(p,letter,home[i],focus,time));

effects.rationaleZh: 字母级受力、基线连线和回弹相位共同说明机制，明显区别于文字拆分后统一补间。

effects.name: Recursive quadtree pulse mosaic
effects.difference: 焦点附近的方块递归四分，远处保持大尺度色块，自动脉冲持续改变细节边界，不是等距网格缩放。

behavior.trigger: pointer movement or automatic focus orbit
behavior.response: The mosaic recursively gains resolution around the moving focus
behavior.timing: continuous focus threshold with discrete recursive subdivision

implementation.snippet: const tile = (x,y,size,depth) => nearFocus(x,y,size) ? splitIntoFour(tile) : p.rect(x,y,size,size);

effects.rationaleZh: 空间距离直接控制递归深度，层级变化在一帧内可读，适合作为信息密度转场参考。

effects.name: Flow field ribbon advection
effects.difference: 34 条带在固定噪声流场中沿多个曲线顶点前进，靠近焦点时方向被连续混合，区别于独立直线粒子或随机游走。

behavior.trigger: pointer movement or automatic attractor orbit
behavior.response: Seeded ribbons advect through curl-like noise and bend toward a local attractor

implementation.snippet: p.noiseSeed(4812); ribbons.forEach(seed => advectCurveVertices(p,seed,focus,time));

effects.rationaleZh: 带状轨迹保留流动记忆，噪声方向和局部吸引的混合在动态中清晰可辨。

effects.name: Delaunay triangulated light sweep
effects.difference: 不规则顶点组成交错三角面，移动光源按每个面的中心距离独立改变综合色与描边，形成连续多面体明暗扫掠。

behavior.trigger: pointer movement, keyboard focus movement, or automatic light orbit
behavior.response: A moving light reveals individual planes across a seeded triangulated mesh

implementation.snippet: triangles.forEach(face => shadeFaceByDistance(p, face, movingLight));

effects.rationaleZh: 单光源跨不规则三角面传播，明暗变化与网格拓扑同时可读，区别于整图渐变扫光。

effects.name: Polar waveform sundial
effects.difference: 双频波形被映射为闭合极坐标轮廓，同时由相位决定日晷阴影方向与长度，不是圆形音频均衡器。

behavior.response: A radial waveform reshapes while a central gnomon casts a phase-linked shadow

effects.prompt: 将两组正弦采样叠加到极坐标半径，并用同一相位驱动中央日晷阴影的角度和长度。

implementation.snippet: new p5(p => { p.draw = () => drawPolarWaveAndShadow(p.drawingContext, phase); });

effects.rationaleZh: 声纹轮廓与日晷指针共享相位，科学仪器般的视觉语言完整。

effects.name: Seeded sandpile avalanche
effects.difference: 中心沙粒按 Abelian sandpile 四邻域规则反复崩塌，最终颜色直接编码每格余数，不是落沙物理。

behavior.trigger: pointer grain count or animation frame
behavior.response: A central heap topples into deterministic four-color avalanche bands

effects.prompt: 实现四邻域 Abelian sandpile；从中心加入确定数量沙粒，迭代到稳定态并按每格 0–3 余数着色。

implementation.snippet: new p5(p => { p.draw = () => drawSandpile(p, stabilize(centerHeap(grainCount))); });

effects.rationaleZh: 雪崩规则、粒数读数和四值色带构成可核验的离散系统，结果稳定。

effects.name: Signed distance neon metropolis
effects.difference: 每个像素计算到六座矩形建筑并集的有符号距离，以边界距离产生霓虹光晕，而非预画线框城市。

behavior.response: Signed distance contours illuminate building unions as the skyline shifts

effects.prompt: 为六个矩形建筑实现 box SDF 与 min-union，在低分辨率栅格中按距离绝对值绘制霓虹边缘。

implementation.snippet: new p5(p => { p.draw = () => rasterSdfUnion(p.drawingContext, buildings, skylineShift); });

effects.rationaleZh: 分析距离场直接形成建筑轮廓与光晕，机制与画面高度一致。

effects.name: Flowfield paper marbling
effects.difference: 七十条固定颜料流线逐步积分正弦向量场，并由指针模拟梳齿改变全局流向，不是 Perlin 噪声背景。

behavior.trigger: pointer comb direction or animation frame
behavior.response: Pigment streams integrate through a combed vector field into marbled paper

effects.prompt: 用固定种子生成七十条颜料流线，逐步积分解析向量场；指针横向位置改变梳理项。

implementation.snippet: new p5(p => { p.draw = () => streams.forEach(stream => integrateAndDraw(p, stream, comb)); });

effects.rationaleZh: 纸张底色、颜料层次和可控梳理共同形成完整的大理石纹艺术效果。

effects.name: Topographic wave contour reveal
effects.difference: 以连续高度切片逐层显露会呼吸的地形，不是普通波纹、遮罩或单条路径描边。

behavior.response: A scanning boundary exposes independently warped altitude contours

effects.prompt: 实现一张由固定地形函数生成的等高线地图，让指针横向位置控制扫描边界并逐层显露高度纹理。

implementation.snippet: new p5(p => { p.draw = () => drawWarpedContours(p.drawingContext, revealProgress); });

effects.rationaleZh: 扫描边界、高度层级和动态形变同时可见，缩略图中无需标题也能读出地形揭示。

effects.name: Magnetic orbit command dock
effects.difference: 五个工具持续绕中心公转，又被指针从轨道局部拉偏，区别于单按钮磁吸或静态径向菜单。

behavior.response: Orbiting commands bend their paths toward the pointer while preserving order

effects.prompt: 实现五个有固定相位的命令按钮轨道，指针靠近时改变轨道中心但不打乱按钮顺序。

implementation.snippet: const orbit = animate(dock, { opacity: [.94, 1, .94] }, { duration: 3 }); orbit.pause();

effects.rationaleZh: 轨道运动与局部磁吸构成双重因果，工具按钮始终可辨且交互反馈强。

effects.name: Stencil text scanline window
effects.difference: 移动扫描尺决定彩色字面真实可见范围，空心字、实色字和刻度线形成印刷校色语义。

behavior.response: A registration bar converts outlined letters into a chromatic stencil

effects.prompt: 实现空心标题与彩色字面叠合的扫描窗，扫描尺和 clip-path 必须共享同一进度。

implementation.snippet: const scan = animate(line, { opacity: [.9, 1, .9] }, { duration: 3 }); scan.pause();

effects.rationaleZh: 印刷模板、彩色扫描和测量刻度形成完整艺术方向，机制一眼明确。

effects.name: Elastic SVG rope lettering
effects.nameZh: 弹性 SVG 绳索字形
effects.difference: 可拉伸贝塞尔路径本身成为字形骨架，节点沿实时弧长重排，而非只让文字沿固定路径移动。

behavior.response: A rope-like letter path deforms and its sampled nodes slide to new arc-length positions

effects.prompt: 实现一条由贝塞尔段组成的绳索字形，拉动控制点后按 getPointAtLength 重新放置节点。

implementation.snippet: const tension = animate(path, { opacity: [.94, 1, .94] }, { duration: 3 }); path.setAttribute('d', nextCurve);

effects.rationaleZh: 路径张力、节点滑移和字形轮廓在同一主体上发生，具有明确的可复用矢量机制。

effects.name: Cursor heatmap crystallization
effects.difference: 热源距离连续决定三角晶体的尺寸、色相与旋转，不是常见圆形热图叠色。

behavior.response: A moving thermal source crystallizes nearby triangles and lets distant cells decay

effects.prompt: 实现固定种子三角晶格，按指针距离计算热量并驱动每片晶体的尺度、透明度和旋转。

implementation.snippet: new p5(p => { p.draw = () => crystals.forEach(c => c.draw(p, heatAt(c, pointer))); });

effects.rationaleZh: 热场被翻译为清晰的晶体生长语言，颜色和几何反馈均有因果。

effects.name: Peelable paper corner reveal
effects.difference: 纸面裁切、折角尺寸、阴影和下层档案同步变化，区别于卡片翻转或简单角标。

behavior.response: The lower corner peels back to expose a persistent second layer

effects.prompt: 实现可拖动纸角，使用同一进度同步 clip-path、多边形折角尺寸、投影和下层显露。

implementation.snippet: const peel = animate(fold, { opacity: [.94, 1, .94] }, { duration: 3 }); paper.style.clipPath = polygon;

effects.rationaleZh: 材料厚度与下层内容通过几何和光影共同建立，动作有真实触感。

effects.name: Radial calendar time zoom
effects.difference: 月份、周段和日期被编码到三层同心弧，指针沿角度选择一天，而不是线性时间轴。

behavior.response: Concentric schedule arcs rotate beneath a needle and resolve one day
behavior.timing: continuous radial scrub with discrete date readout

effects.prompt: 实现三层同心日历弧和固定选针，横向输入映射到 360 度并更新离散日期。

implementation.snippet: const dial = animate(svg, { opacity: [.94, 1, .94] }, { duration: 3 }); needle.setAttribute('transform', `rotate(${angle})`);

effects.rationaleZh: 径向结构使时间层级可视化，连续角度与离散日期的对应清楚。

effects.name: Typography particle disassembly field
effects.difference: 从真实文字像素采样粒子，按固定向量场解体并可逆重组，不是随机散点背景。

behavior.response: Sampled glyph pixels leave their exact letter positions and enter a swirl field

effects.prompt: 在离屏 Canvas 渲染词语并采样 alpha 像素，以固定种子位移场实现可逆的字形解体。

implementation.snippet: new p5(p => { const points = sampleGlyphMask(); p.draw = () => drawDisassembly(p, points, progress); });

effects.rationaleZh: 粒子来源能精确回到字形，解体前后语义连续且视觉变化显著。

effects.name: Liquid lens card refraction
effects.difference: 不规则透镜移动时改变下方条纹的模糊、饱和度、色相和内反光，而非单纯玻璃卡。

behavior.response: A deforming optical lens refracts the patterned card underneath

effects.prompt: 实现可拖动不规则透镜，用 backdrop-filter、内阴影和动态边界共同表现折射。

implementation.snippet: const lensMotion = animate(lens, { opacity: [.94, 1, .94] }, { duration: 3 }); lens.style.backdropFilter = filter;

effects.rationaleZh: 高对比底纹让折射结果可核验，透镜边缘和材质语言完整。

effects.name: Accordion depth tunnel navigation
effects.difference: 四个章节平面按序折开并沿 Z 轴后退，形成可进入的内容隧道，而非二维手风琴列表。

behavior.response: Chapter panels hinge open while receding into a perspective tunnel

effects.prompt: 实现四层 preserve-3d 章节面板，以交错进度同步 rotateY、translateZ 和亮度。

implementation.snippet: const tunnelMotion = animate(tunnel, { opacity: [.94, 1, .94] }, { duration: 3 }); panels.forEach(renderDepthPanel);

effects.rationaleZh: 章节层级、开门动作和隧道纵深都能在小尺寸中读清。

effects.name: SVG metaball cursor separation
effects.difference: 四个液态成员在同一 SVG 滤镜场内从融合体分离，拓扑连接随距离真实改变。

behavior.response: A fused SVG mass separates into ordered orbiting blobs

effects.prompt: 使用 feGaussianBlur 与 feColorMatrix 构建融球滤镜，让四圆从单体连续分离并保持轨道顺序。

implementation.snippet: const groupMotion = animate(group, { opacity: [.94, 1, .94] }, { duration: 3 }); blobs.forEach(setOrbitalPosition);

effects.rationaleZh: 融合和断开的拓扑变化直接可见，区别于普通圆点轨道。

effects.name: Gesture sliced image shutters
effects.difference: 同一图像被八个垂直切片按正弦相位错开，仍维持可拼回的背景坐标。

behavior.response: Image slices stagger vertically and skew like independent shutters

effects.prompt: 将一张图像切为八个保持背景坐标的竖片，按指针进度和相位函数错位与倾斜。

implementation.snippet: const shutters = animate(track, { opacity: [.94, 1, .94] }, { duration: 3 }); slices.forEach(applyPhaseShift);

effects.rationaleZh: 切片仍能重组成原图，手势错位具有强烈且可逆的视觉签名。

effects.name: Offline audio spectral ribbon
effects.difference: 真实 OfflineAudioContext 生成扫频采样，再由多层曲线读取样本折叠成丝带，不是伪随机均衡器。

behavior.trigger: offline audio render and animation frame
behavior.response: Rendered oscillator samples bend twelve luminous spectral threads

effects.prompt: 用 OfflineAudioContext 渲染一秒扫频音频，读取真实 channel data 并绘制十二层频谱丝带。

implementation.snippet: const buffer = await offline.startRendering(); new p5(p => { p.draw = () => drawRibbon(p, buffer.getChannelData(0)); });

effects.rationaleZh: 音频数据来源可核验，丝带层次与扫频变化形成鲜明艺术结果。

effects.name: Gravity well icon field
effects.difference: 界面符号按固定轨道半径和角速度围绕移动重力井弯曲，不是粒子吸附或普通图标云。

behavior.response: Interface glyphs orbit a movable gravity well with preserved mass bands

effects.prompt: 实现三圈不同半径和角速度的界面图标轨道，让指针成为可移动重力井。

implementation.snippet: new p5(p => { p.draw = () => icons.forEach(icon => drawOrbit(p, icon, pointer)); });

effects.rationaleZh: 符号、质量中心和轨道带共同表达界面重力，主体行为清楚。

effects.name: Scroll stitched isometric blueprint
effects.difference: 五个架构模块从视口外按语义次序落入等轴坐标并组成一张蓝图，不是卡片入场。

behavior.trigger: scroll progress or pointer vertical progress
behavior.response: Architecture blocks stitch into fixed isometric destinations

effects.prompt: 实现五个带标签的等轴模块，以滚动进度按序移动到固定网格并更新组装百分比。

implementation.snippet: const assembly = animate(iso, { opacity: [.94, 1, .94] }, { duration: 3 }); blocks.forEach(stitchToGrid);

effects.rationaleZh: 蓝图网格、组件语义和组装次序共同构成可读的空间建设过程。

effects.name: Pixel sort hover wipe
effects.difference: 扫描线左侧真实按列重排像素亮度，右侧保持原始程序化图像，不是 CSS 拉伸故障。

behavior.response: A wipe boundary sorts completed image columns by luminance

effects.prompt: 生成固定程序化风景，按指针边界逐列读取像素并按亮度排序，再写回 ImageData。

implementation.snippet: new p5(p => { p.draw = () => p.drawingContext.putImageData(sortColumns(source, progress), 128, 25); });

effects.rationaleZh: 原图与排序结果并排可见，数据重排机制能够直接核验。

effects.name: Kinetic variable font axis
effects.difference: 四个字母的宽度、重量、纵向比例和基线波动沿同一轴连续编排，不是整体文字缩放。

behavior.response: Individual glyphs traverse coordinated width and weight axes

effects.prompt: 逐字控制 font-variation-settings、scaleX、scaleY 和基线波动，构成从压缩到扩展的字体轴演示。

implementation.snippet: const axisMotion = animate(word, { opacity: [.94, 1, .94] }, { duration: 3 }); glyphs.forEach(setFontAxes);

effects.rationaleZh: 字母级宽度与重量差异明显，排版主体保持可读且富有节奏。

effects.name: Animated Bezier route cartography
effects.difference: 路线按真实 SVG 弧长被绘出，载具同时读取相邻点切线改变朝向，不是圆点沿 CSS 偏移路径。

behavior.response: A route draws forward while a vehicle follows its exact tangent

effects.prompt: 使用 getTotalLength 与 getPointAtLength 同步路线 dashoffset、载具位置和切线朝向。

implementation.snippet: const mapMotion = animate(route, { opacity: [.94, 1, .94] }, { duration: 3 }); vehicle.setAttribute('cx', route.getPointAtLength(s).x);

effects.rationaleZh: 绘线、定位和朝向由同一弧长参数驱动，地图叙事明确。

effects.name: Cellular automata hover bloom
effects.difference: 指针注入的细胞遵循 Conway 规则演化成像素城市，录制任意时间都可由初始种子重算。

behavior.response: A seeded cellular field blooms, competes, and decays under Life rules

effects.prompt: 实现固定初始种子的 Conway Life；每帧从初态重算到目标代数，指针可注入一个稳定小型种群。

implementation.snippet: new p5(p => { p.draw = () => drawLife(p, evolve(initialSeed, targetGeneration)); });

effects.rationaleZh: 代数计数、规则生长和用户播种因果完整，像素城市形态鲜明。

effects.name: Spring loaded split flap counter
effects.difference: 三位数字各自错峰翻页并带旋转、下沉和亮度冲击，区别于普通数字补间。

behavior.response: Mechanical digit flaps rotate and settle with phase-offset weight

effects.prompt: 实现三位 split-flap 数字，每位按相位错开 rotateX、下沉和亮度变化并更新读数。

implementation.snippet: const counterMotion = animate(counter, { opacity: [.94, 1, .94] }, { duration: 3 }); flaps.forEach(renderMechanicalDigit);

effects.rationaleZh: 机械分割线、立体翻页和错峰落位传达清楚的重量感。

effects.name: Caustic light card surface
effects.difference: 二十四条相干波线在卡片裁切区域内叠加出水下焦散，而不是通用渐变或噪声闪烁。

behavior.response: Layered wave fronts focus and drift across a submerged card

effects.prompt: 在圆角卡片裁切区内叠加多组相干正弦曲线，用 lighter 合成表现缓慢漂移的水下焦散。

implementation.snippet: new p5(p => { p.draw = () => drawCausticWavefronts(p.drawingContext, phase); });

effects.rationaleZh: 水下材质、焦散层次和文字卡片形成完成度很高的光影场景。

effects.name: Cursor drawn constellation thread
effects.difference: 指针动态选择距离最近的七颗星并按距离缝合成路径，选中星有独立光环，不是全连接粒子网。

behavior.response: A thread snaps through the nearest stars and continually redraws a constellation

effects.prompt: 生成固定星图；每帧寻找距指针最近的七颗星，按距离顺序绘制一条带节点光环的星座线。

implementation.snippet: new p5(p => { p.draw = () => drawThread(p, nearestStars(pointer, 7)); });

effects.rationaleZh: 星线选择由空间关系驱动，用户轨迹会产生明显不同的星座构图。

effects.name: Elastic Voronoi focus mosaic
effects.nameZh: 弹性 Voronoi 焦点马赛克
effects.difference: 离指针最近的种子通过距离权重扩大势力范围，整张镶嵌实时弹性重分区，而非放大一张图片。

behavior.response: The nearest Voronoi region gains spatial weight and pushes neighboring cells away

effects.prompt: 实现固定种子的加权 Voronoi 栅格，降低焦点种子的距离权重，使最近区域连续扩张。

implementation.snippet: new p5(p => { p.draw = () => rasterWeightedVoronoi(p, seeds, focusedSeed); });

effects.rationaleZh: 焦点与全局重分区关系清楚，色块边界具有独特的弹性空间感。

effects.name: Chromatic channel drag portrait
effects.difference: 程序化肖像被真实以 screen 模式绘制为 RGB 三通道并向相反方向位移，不是 CSS 阴影故障。

behavior.response: Red and blue portrait channels separate around a fixed green registration layer

effects.prompt: 绘制同一程序化肖像三次，以 screen 合成红绿蓝通道，并按指针横向位置反向分离红蓝层。

implementation.snippet: new p5(p => { p.draw = () => drawRgbPortrait(p.drawingContext, channelShift); });

effects.rationaleZh: 肖像轮廓提供稳定参照，通道分离的方向和距离都容易辨认。

effects.name: Procedural folding kaleidoscope
effects.difference: 指针改变真实镜像扇区数量，每个扇区用旋转加负缩放成对折叠，而非播放预制万花筒影片。

behavior.response: Procedural color geometry refolds into five to ten mirrored sectors

effects.prompt: 用 Canvas clip、rotate 和 scale(-1,1) 构建成对镜像扇区，让指针连续选择五至十折。

implementation.snippet: new p5(p => { p.draw = () => drawMirroredSectors(p.drawingContext, foldCount); });

effects.rationaleZh: 折数变化会重组整幅几何，镜像关系准确且色彩完成度突出。
